requirement_topic.en: EMC (Electromagnetic Compatibility) — MASM / MNS Standards for Radio and Telecommunications Terminal Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容（EMC）——无线电及电信终端设备的MASM / MNS标准
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容（EMC）——無線電及電信終端設備的MASM / MNS標準

summary.en: Electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) requirements for radio and telecommunications terminal equipment sold in Mongolia are governed through a combination of Mongolian national standards (MNS) administered by MASM (Mongolian Agency for Standardization and Metrology) and technical specifications that may be incorporated by reference into CRC type approval requirements. Mongolia has adopted MNS standards based on international IEC and CISPR publications for EMC. Relevant EMC standards in the Mongolian context include MNS adaptations of CISPR 32 (emissions from multimedia equipment), CISPR 35 (immunity for multimedia equipment), and IEC 61000-series standards (conducted and radiated emissions; immunity to electrostatic discharge, radiated and conducted RF immunity, electrical fast transient, surge, and voltage dips). In practice, CRC type approval submissions for radio and telecommunications terminal equipment are expected to include EMC test reports demonstrating compliance with applicable standards; MASM may additionally require conformity assessment for certain product categories under its national standardisation role. Mongolia is not a member of the EAEU and is not subject to TR EAEU 020/2011 (Technical Regulation on Electromagnetic Compatibility) — EAEU EAC EMC certification does not apply or substitute for Mongolian MNS-based EMC requirements. CE (EN 55032 / EN 55035 / EN 61000-series) test reports may be useful technical reference in the CRC type approval process, but CE conformity does not independently satisfy Mongolian EMC requirements. China GB EMC standards (GB/T 9254 for emissions; GB/T 17618 for immunity) are likewise not directly recognised. GOST-R EMC test reports may carry informational weight in a CRC submission. Importers should confirm current MNS EMC standard applicability and acceptable test house accreditations with CRC and MASM before submitting type approval applications.
summary.zh: 蒙古国销售的无线电及电信终端设备电磁兼容（EMC）要求由MASM（蒙古国标准与计量局）管理的蒙古国国家标准（MNS）与CRC型号核准要求中可能引用的技术规范共同约束。蒙古国已采纳基于IEC和CISPR国际出版物的MNS标准，用于EMC管理。蒙古国背景下的相关EMC标准包括CISPR 32（多媒体设备辐射骚扰）、CISPR 35（多媒体设备抗扰度）以及IEC 61000系列标准（传导和辐射骚扰；静电放电、辐射和传导射频抗扰度、电快速瞬变、浪涌及电压跌落免疫）的MNS适配版本。实践中，无线电及电信终端设备的CRC型号核准申请预计须包含证明符合适用标准的EMC测试报告；MASM在其国家标准化职能下可能对特定产品类别额外要求合格评定。蒙古国不是EAEU成员国，不适用TR EAEU 020/2011（电磁兼容技术法规）——EAEU EAC EMC认证在蒙古国不适用且不可替代基于MNS的EMC要求。CE（EN 55032 / EN 55035 / EN 61000系列）测试报告可作为CRC型号核准过程中的辅助技术参考，但CE合规并不独立满足蒙古国EMC要求。中国GB EMC标准（GB/T 9254辐射骚扰；GB/T 17618抗扰度）同样不被直接认可。GOST-R EMC测试报告在CRC申请中可能具有参考价值。进口商在提交型号核准申请前，应直接向CRC和MASM确认当前MNS EMC标准适用性及可接受的测试机构认可要求。
summary.zht: 蒙古國銷售的無線電及電信終端設備電磁相容（EMC）要求由MASM（蒙古國標準與計量局）管理的蒙古國國家標準（MNS）與CRC型號核准要求中可能引用的技術規範共同約束。蒙古國已採納基於IEC和CISPR國際出版物的MNS標準，用於EMC管理。蒙古國背景下的相關EMC標準包括CISPR 32（多媒體設備輻射騷擾）、CISPR 35（多媒體設備抗擾度）以及IEC 61000系列標準（傳導和輻射騷擾；靜電放電、輻射和傳導射頻抗擾度、電快速瞬變、浪湧及電壓跌落免疫）的MNS適配版本。實踐中，無線電及電信終端設備的CRC型號核准申請預計須包含證明符合適用標準的EMC測試報告；MASM在其國家標準化職能下可能對特定產品類別額外要求合格評定。蒙古國不是EAEU成員國，不適用TR EAEU 020/2011（電磁相容技術法規）——EAEU EAC EMC認證在蒙古國不適用且不可替代基於MNS的EMC要求。CE（EN 55032 / EN 55035 / EN 61000系列）測試報告可作為CRC型號核准過程中的輔助技術參考，但CE合規並不獨立滿足蒙古國EMC要求。中國GB EMC標準（GB/T 9254輻射騷擾；GB/T 17618抗擾度）同樣不被直接認可。GOST-R EMC測試報告在CRC申請中可能具有參考價值。進口商在提交型號核准申請前，應直接向CRC和MASM確認當前MNS EMC標準適用性及可接受的測試機構認可要求。

standards_or_laws: MNS CISPR 32 (where adopted) — Mongolian National Standard based on CISPR 32: Multimedia equipment — electromagnetic disturbance characteristics — limits and methods of measurement; administered by MASM
MNS CISPR 35 (where adopted) — Mongolian National Standard based on CISPR 35: Multimedia equipment — immunity characteristics — limits and methods of measurement; administered by MASM
MNS IEC 61000-series (where adopted) — Mongolian National Standards based on IEC 61000 EMC series: emissions and immunity requirements; administered by MASM
Law of Mongolia on Standardization — establishes MASM role in adopting and administering national EMC standards
Electronic Communications Law of Mongolia (2011) — CRC may incorporate EMC compliance as part of type approval technical file requirements for radio and telecommunications terminal equipment

summary.en: China's mandatory EMC framework for radio and telecommunications terminal equipment is based on GB standards administered by MIIT and SAC (Standardization Administration of China), enforced through CCC (China Compulsory Certification) for in-scope products and through SRRC/MIIT technical requirements for radio equipment. Key Chinese EMC standards include: GB/T 9254.1 (radiated and conducted emissions for information technology equipment, aligned with CISPR 32); GB/T 17618 (immunity for information technology equipment, aligned with CISPR 35); GB/T 6833-series (EMC for electronic measuring instruments); and MIIT/SRRC technical specifications that incorporate EMC parameters within radio equipment type approval conditions. CCC certification for applicable product categories mandates compliance with these GB EMC standards, verified by CNCA-designated laboratories. For SRRC type approval, EMC-related parameters such as spurious emissions are assessed as part of the radio equipment technical specification. Chinese CCC / GB EMC certifications are China-specific and do not substitute for Mongolian MNS-based EMC requirements or MASM conformity assessment. EMC test data generated to Chinese GB standards may have technical relevance as reference in a CRC type approval submission, but a formal re-test to MNS-applicable standards by a CRC-acceptable laboratory will typically be required.
summary.zh: 中国无线电及电信终端设备的强制性EMC框架基于由工业和信息化部（MIIT）和标准化管理委员会（SAC）管理的GB标准，通过CNCA强制认证（CCC，适用于范围内产品）以及无线电设备SRRC/工业和信息化部技术要求执行。主要中国EMC标准包括：GB/T 9254.1（信息技术设备辐射和传导骚扰，与CISPR 32接轨）；GB/T 17618（信息技术设备抗扰度，与CISPR 35接轨）；GB/T 6833系列（电子测量仪器EMC）；以及将EMC参数纳入无线电设备型号核准条件的MIIT/SRRC技术规范。CCC认证对适用产品类别要求符合上述GB EMC标准，由CNCA指定实验室验证。对于SRRC型号核准，杂散辐射等EMC相关参数作为无线电设备技术规范的一部分进行评估。中国CCC / GB EMC认证属于中国特定认证，不可替代基于MNS的蒙古国EMC要求或MASM合格评定。依据中国GB标准生成的EMC测试数据在CRC型号核准申请中可能具有参考技术价值，但通常仍须由CRC可接受实验室依据MNS适用标准重新进行正式测试。
summary.zht: 中國無線電及電信終端設備的強制性EMC框架基於由工業和信息化部（MIIT）和標準化管理委員會（SAC）管理的GB標準，通過CNCA強制認證（CCC，適用於範圍內產品）以及無線電設備SRRC/工業和信息化部技術要求執行。主要中國EMC標準包括：GB/T 9254.1（信息技術設備輻射和傳導騷擾，與CISPR 32接軌）；GB/T 17618（信息技術設備抗擾度，與CISPR 35接軌）；GB/T 6833系列（電子測量儀器EMC）；以及將EMC參數納入無線電設備型號核准條件的MIIT/SRRC技術規範。CCC認證對適用產品類別要求符合上述GB EMC標準，由CNCA指定實驗室驗證。對於SRRC型號核准，雜散輻射等EMC相關參數作為無線電設備技術規範的一部分進行評估。中國CCC / GB EMC認證屬於中國特定認證，不可替代基於MNS的蒙古國EMC要求或MASM合格評定。依據中國GB標準生成的EMC測試數據在CRC型號核准申請中可能具有參考技術價值，但通常仍須由CRC可接受實驗室依據MNS適用標準重新進行正式測試。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254.1 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of information technology equipment (aligned with CISPR 32); mandatory via CCC for in-scope products in China
GB/T 17618 — Information technology equipment — immunity characteristics — limits and methods of measurement (aligned with CISPR 35)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — enforces GB EMC standards for in-scope consumer electronics and IT products in China; administered by CNCA
SRRC radio type approval — incorporates EMC-adjacent parameters (spurious emissions, spectral mask) as part of radio equipment technical specification requirements in China

gap.en: Chinese CCC and GB-standard EMC certifications (GB/T 9254.1, GB/T 17618) are China-specific and do not substitute for MNS-based EMC requirements administered by MASM and incorporated into CRC type approval for wireless and telecom terminal equipment in Mongolia. Mongolia is not an EAEU member and TR EAEU 020/2011 EAC EMC certification does not apply. CE (EN 55032 / EN 55035) EMC test reports may carry informational value in a CRC submission but do not independently satisfy Mongolian requirements. GOST-R EMC test reports may be used as supporting technical reference. A formal EMC re-test to MNS-applicable CISPR/IEC standards by a laboratory whose accreditation is accepted by CRC will typically be required for Mongolian type approval. Importers should confirm with CRC whether existing CE or GOST-R EMC test data can reduce the scope of required re-testing. The Mongolian market has limited local EMC testing laboratory infrastructure; testing may need to be performed at a foreign-accredited laboratory acceptable to CRC. MASM manages the adoption and publication of MNS standards and should be consulted to confirm the current MNS versions applicable to the device category.
gap.zh: 中国CCC及GB标准EMC认证（GB/T 9254.1、GB/T 17618）属于中国特定认证，不可替代蒙古国MASM管理并纳入CRC无线和电信终端设备型号核准的基于MNS的EMC要求。蒙古国不是EAEU成员国，TR EAEU 020/2011 EAC EMC认证不适用。CE（EN 55032 / EN 55035）EMC测试报告在CRC申请中可能具有参考价值，但不独立满足蒙古国要求。GOST-R EMC测试报告可作为辅助技术参考。蒙古国型号核准通常需要由CRC认可认证资质的实验室依据MNS适用的CISPR/IEC标准进行正式EMC重新测试。进口商应向CRC确认现有CE或GOST-R EMC测试数据是否可缩减所需重新测试范围。蒙古国本地EMC测试实验室基础设施有限；测试可能需在CRC可接受的境外认证实验室进行。MASM负责MNS标准的采纳和发布，应向其咨询确认适用于产品类别的当前MNS版本。
gap.zht: 中國CCC及GB標準EMC認證（GB/T 9254.1、GB/T 17618）屬於中國特定認證，不可替代蒙古國MASM管理並納入CRC無線和電信終端設備型號核准的基於MNS的EMC要求。蒙古國不是EAEU成員國，TR EAEU 020/2011 EAC EMC認證不適用。CE（EN 55032 / EN 55035）EMC測試報告在CRC申請中可能具有參考價值，但不獨立滿足蒙古國要求。GOST-R EMC測試報告可作為輔助技術參考。蒙古國型號核准通常需要由CRC認可認證資質的實驗室依據MNS適用的CISPR/IEC標準進行正式EMC重新測試。進口商應向CRC確認現有CE或GOST-R EMC測試數據是否可縮減所需重新測試範圍。蒙古國本地EMC測試實驗室基礎設施有限；測試可能需在CRC可接受的境外認證實驗室進行。MASM負責MNS標準的採納和發布，應向其諮詢確認適用於產品類別的當前MNS版本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (via CRC type approval and MASM national standards framework) — EMC test reports to MNS-applicable CISPR/IEC standards required as part of CRC type approval submission; Chinese CCC / GB EMC certifications do not substitute; EAEU EAC EMC (TR EAEU 020/2011) not applicable
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification enforces GB/T 9254.1 (emissions) and GB/T 17618 (immunity) for in-scope products; SRRC type approval covers RF spectral parameters; does not extend to or substitute for Mongolian MNS-based EMC requirements

source.publisher: MASM — Mongolian Agency for Standardization and Metrology; CRC — Communications Regulatory Commission of Mongolia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC compliance for wireless and telecommunications terminal equipment in Mongolia is governed by MNS standards (based on CISPR and IEC 61000 series) administered by MASM, with EMC test reports forming a required component of the CRC type approval technical file. Chinese CCC / GB EMC certifications and EAEU EAC EMC certification (TR EAEU 020/2011) do not substitute for Mongolian requirements. CE EMC test reports may provide technical reference value in a CRC submission but do not independently satisfy Mongolian requirements. Testing by a CRC-acceptable accredited laboratory to MNS-applicable standards is typically required. Confirm current MNS EMC standard versions and acceptable laboratory accreditations directly with CRC and MASM before commencing testing.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 蒙古国无线电及电信终端设备EMC合规受MASM管理的MNS标准（基于CISPR和IEC 61000系列）约束，EMC测试报告是CRC型号核准技术文件的必要组成部分。中国CCC / GB EMC认证及EAEU EAC EMC认证（TR EAEU 020/2011）不可替代蒙古国要求。CE EMC测试报告在CRC申请中可提供技术参考价值，但不独立满足蒙古国要求。通常需要由CRC可接受的认可实验室依据MNS适用标准进行测试。开始测试前，请直接向CRC和MASM确认当前MNS EMC标准版本及可接受的实验室认可要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 蒙古國無線電及電信終端設備EMC合規受MASM管理的MNS標準（基於CISPR和IEC 61000系列）約束，EMC測試報告是CRC型號核准技術文件的必要組成部分。中國CCC / GB EMC認證及EAEU EAC EMC認證（TR EAEU 020/2011）不可替代蒙古國要求。CE EMC測試報告在CRC申請中可提供技術參考價值，但不獨立滿足蒙古國要求。通常需要由CRC可接受的認可實驗室依據MNS適用標準進行測試。開始測試前，請直接向CRC和MASM確認當前MNS EMC標準版本及可接受的實驗室認可要求。

requirement_topic.en: Radio Spectrum Compliance and Frequency Band Authorisation — CRC Spectrum Management for 2.4 GHz / 5 GHz Wi-Fi and Bluetooth
requirement_topic.zh: 无线电频谱合规与频段授权——CRC对2.4 GHz / 5 GHz Wi-Fi及蓝牙的频谱管理
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電頻譜合規與頻段授權——CRC對2.4 GHz / 5 GHz Wi-Fi及藍牙的頻譜管理

summary.en: Radio frequency spectrum management in Mongolia is administered by the CRC (Communications Regulatory Commission) under the Electronic Communications Law 2011. The CRC publishes a national frequency allocation table based on the ITU Radio Regulations and issues spectrum authorisations (Зөвшөөрөл) for commercial radio use. For short-range radio devices including Wi-Fi and Bluetooth, CRC may designate certain frequency bands as licence-exempt (general authorisation / light licensing) subject to power and technical parameter limits specified in CRC regulations. The 2.4 GHz ISM band (2400–2483.5 MHz) used by Wi-Fi 802.11 b/g/n/ax and Bluetooth 2.4 GHz is generally available under CRC licence-exempt provisions in Mongolia, with transmit power limits typically aligned with ITU regional norms, but specific CRC limits must be confirmed. The 5 GHz band is subject to more restrictive CRC spectrum management: not all 5 GHz sub-bands (UNII-1: 5150–5250 MHz; UNII-2: 5250–5350 MHz; UNII-2e: 5470–5725 MHz; UNII-3: 5725–5850 MHz) may be authorised for licence-exempt operation, and outdoor use restrictions and DFS (Dynamic Frequency Selection) and TPC (Transmit Power Control) requirements may differ from Chinese SRRC or European ETSI arrangements. Devices with multi-band capability (e.g. 2.4 GHz + 5 GHz Wi-Fi + Bluetooth) must comply with CRC requirements for each band independently. CRC type approval technical submissions must include a complete list of operating frequencies, modulation types, channel bandwidths, and maximum EIRP for each band. Vendors should confirm 5 GHz sub-band availability and any outdoor use restrictions directly with CRC before finalising device specifications for the Mongolian market. Mongolia follows ITU Region 3 (Asia-Pacific) frequency allocation, which differs from Region 1 (Europe/Africa) and Region 2 (Americas) in certain bands.
summary.zh: 蒙古国无线电频谱管理由CRC（通信监管委员会）依据2011年《电子通信法》执行。CRC依据ITU无线电规则发布国家频率划分表，并为商业无线电使用颁发频谱授权（Зөвшөөрөл）。对于包括Wi-Fi和蓝牙在内的短距离无线设备，CRC可依据法规规定的功率和技术参数限制，将特定频段指定为免执照（通用授权/轻度许可）。Wi-Fi 802.11 b/g/n/ax和蓝牙2.4 GHz使用的2.4 GHz ISM频段（2400–2483.5 MHz）在蒙古国通常在CRC免执照规定下可用，发射功率限制通常与ITU区域规范接轨，但需向CRC确认具体限制。5 GHz频段受更严格的CRC频谱管理：并非所有5 GHz子频段（UNII-1：5150–5250 MHz；UNII-2：5250–5350 MHz；UNII-2e：5470–5725 MHz；UNII-3：5725–5850 MHz）均可获得免执照运营授权，户外使用限制及DFS（动态频率选择）和TPC（发射功率控制）要求可能与中国SRRC或欧洲ETSI安排不同。具备多频段能力的设备（如2.4 GHz + 5 GHz Wi-Fi + 蓝牙）须独立满足各频段的CRC要求。CRC型号核准技术申请须包含各频段的工作频率、调制类型、信道带宽和最大EIRP的完整清单。供应商在确定蒙古国市场设备规格前，应直接向CRC确认5 GHz子频段可用性及户外使用限制。蒙古国遵循ITU第3区（亚太区）频率划分，与第1区（欧洲/非洲）和第2区（美洲）在某些频段有所不同。
summary.zht: 蒙古國無線電頻譜管理由CRC（通信監管委員會）依據2011年《電子通信法》執行。CRC依據ITU無線電規則發布國家頻率劃分表，並為商業無線電使用頒發頻譜授權（Зөвшөөрөл）。對於包括Wi-Fi和藍牙在內的短距離無線設備，CRC可依據法規規定的功率和技術參數限制，將特定頻段指定為免執照（通用授權/輕度許可）。Wi-Fi 802.11 b/g/n/ax和藍牙2.4 GHz使用的2.4 GHz ISM頻段（2400–2483.5 MHz）在蒙古國通常在CRC免執照規定下可用，發射功率限制通常與ITU區域規範接軌，但需向CRC確認具體限制。5 GHz頻段受更嚴格的CRC頻譜管理：並非所有5 GHz子頻段（UNII-1：5150–5250 MHz；UNII-2：5250–5350 MHz；UNII-2e：5470–5725 MHz；UNII-3：5725–5850 MHz）均可獲得免執照運營授權，戶外使用限制及DFS（動態頻率選擇）和TPC（發射功率控制）要求可能與中國SRRC或歐洲ETSI安排不同。具備多頻段能力的設備（如2.4 GHz + 5 GHz Wi-Fi + 藍牙）須獨立滿足各頻段的CRC要求。CRC型號核准技術申請須包含各頻段的工作頻率、調製類型、信道帶寬和最大EIRP的完整清單。供應商在確定蒙古國市場設備規格前，應直接向CRC確認5 GHz子頻段可用性及戶外使用限制。蒙古國遵循ITU第3區（亞太區）頻率劃分，與第1區（歐洲/非洲）和第2區（美洲）在某些頻段有所不同。

standards_or_laws: Electronic Communications Law of Mongolia (2011) — establishes CRC authority over national radio spectrum management and frequency authorisation
CRC National Frequency Allocation Table — based on ITU Radio Regulations, ITU Region 3 (Asia-Pacific) allocation; governs licence-exempt and licensed spectrum use in Mongolia
ITU Radio Regulations — international treaty framework for spectrum allocation; Mongolia follows Region 3 allocations
CRC spectrum authorisation (Зөвшөөрөл) — required for commercial radio frequency use in Mongolia; licence-exempt provisions may cover 2.4 GHz ISM band under CRC-specified power limits

summary.en: China's radio frequency spectrum management is administered by SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission) under MIIT, pursuant to the Radio Regulations of the PRC. China has designated the 2.4 GHz band (2400–2483.5 MHz) and specified 5 GHz sub-bands (including UNII-1 5150–5250 MHz for indoor use, UNII-2/2e with DFS requirements, and UNII-3 5725–5850 MHz) as available for Wi-Fi use, with maximum transmit power limits specified in SRRC regulatory documents. Bluetooth 2.4 GHz is similarly authorised for licence-exempt short-range operation under SRRC provisions. SRRC type approval for radio equipment requires testing to demonstrate compliance with Chinese frequency allocation parameters, spurious emissions limits, and occupancy/power specifications. China follows ITU Region 3 (Asia-Pacific) frequency allocations, which partially aligns with Mongolia's regional allocation — however, national frequency plans and CRC-specific power limits may differ. The 5 GHz UNII-3 band (5725–5850 MHz) is authorised in China for Wi-Fi at up to 200 mW EIRP for outdoor use under specific conditions; CRC Mongolia may have different power ceilings or outdoor use restrictions for this sub-band. Chinese SRRC frequency authorisation is China-specific and does not extend to or substitute for CRC spectrum authorisation in Mongolia.
summary.zh: 中国无线电频谱管理由国家无线电管理委员会（SRRC）依据工业和信息化部的职权，依照《中华人民共和国无线电管理条例》执行。中国已将2.4 GHz频段（2400–2483.5 MHz）和特定5 GHz子频段（包括室内使用的UNII-1 5150–5250 MHz、带DFS要求的UNII-2/2e，以及UNII-3 5725–5850 MHz）指定为Wi-Fi可用频段，并在SRRC法规文件中规定了最大发射功率限制。蓝牙2.4 GHz同样依据SRRC规定获准以免执照短距离运营方式使用。无线电设备SRRC型号核准要求通过测试证明符合中国频率划分参数、杂散辐射限制及占用/功率规范。中国遵循ITU第3区（亚太区）频率划分，与蒙古国区域划分部分一致——但各国频率计划和CRC特定功率限制可能存在差异。5 GHz UNII-3频段（5725–5850 MHz）在中国在特定条件下授权用于户外Wi-Fi，最大EIRP可达200 mW；蒙古国CRC对该子频段可能设有不同的功率上限或户外使用限制。中国SRRC频谱授权为中国特定授权，不具有境外效力，不可替代蒙古国CRC频谱授权。
summary.zht: 中國無線電頻譜管理由國家無線電管理委員會（SRRC）依據工業和信息化部的職權，依照《中華人民共和國無線電管理條例》執行。中國已將2.4 GHz頻段（2400–2483.5 MHz）和特定5 GHz子頻段（包括室內使用的UNII-1 5150–5250 MHz、帶DFS要求的UNII-2/2e，以及UNII-3 5725–5850 MHz）指定為Wi-Fi可用頻段，並在SRRC法規文件中規定了最大發射功率限制。藍牙2.4 GHz同樣依據SRRC規定獲准以免執照短距離運營方式使用。無線電設備SRRC型號核准要求通過測試證明符合中國頻率劃分參數、雜散輻射限制及占用/功率規範。中國遵循ITU第3區（亞太區）頻率劃分，與蒙古國區域劃分部分一致——但各國頻率計劃和CRC特定功率限制可能存在差異。5 GHz UNII-3頻段（5725–5850 MHz）在中國在特定條件下授權用於戶外Wi-Fi，最大EIRP可達200 mW；蒙古國CRC對該子頻段可能設有不同的功率上限或戶外使用限制。中國SRRC頻譜授權為中國特定授權，不具有境外效力，不可替代蒙古國CRC頻譜授權。

standards_or_laws: Radio Regulations of the PRC — framework law for radio spectrum management in China; authorises SRRC to administer frequency allocations and type approval
SRRC Radio Type Approval technical specifications — include frequency allocation compliance, spurious emissions limits, channel bandwidth and EIRP limits for 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz Wi-Fi and Bluetooth
MIIT / SRRC — 5 GHz Wi-Fi frequency allocation documents specifying UNII sub-band availability, indoor/outdoor use restrictions, and DFS/TPC requirements in China
ITU Radio Regulations Region 3 — Asia-Pacific frequency allocation; applied by both China and Mongolia but with national variances in power limits and specific sub-band conditions

gap.en: Chinese SRRC spectrum authorisation and frequency parameters for 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz Wi-Fi and Bluetooth do not automatically apply in Mongolia. CRC administers its own national frequency allocation and licence-exempt framework. The 5 GHz band presents the most significant gap: not all 5 GHz UNII sub-bands permitted by SRRC in China may be approved for licence-exempt use by CRC in Mongolia, and CRC may impose different maximum EIRP limits, DFS requirements, and outdoor use restrictions. Device firmware and hardware must be confirmed against CRC Mongolia frequency allocation before market entry — devices configured to Chinese SRRC 5 GHz parameters may require firmware reconfiguration to comply with CRC limits. The 2.4 GHz ISM band is generally available licence-exempt in Mongolia but CRC power limits should be confirmed. Multi-band devices (2.4 GHz + 5 GHz + Bluetooth) must satisfy CRC requirements independently for each band. CRC type approval technical file must include complete per-band frequency, power, and modulation data. Although both China and Mongolia follow ITU Region 3 allocations, national CRC plans may differ from Chinese SRRC arrangements in band-specific conditions. There is no automatic mutual recognition of spectrum authorisation between China and Mongolia.
gap.zh: 中国SRRC对2.4 GHz和5 GHz Wi-Fi及蓝牙的频谱授权和频率参数不自动适用于蒙古国。CRC执行其独立的国家频率划分和免执照框架。5 GHz频段差距最为显著：中国SRRC批准的并非所有5 GHz UNII子频段均可获得蒙古国CRC的免执照使用批准，且CRC可能对最大EIRP限制、DFS要求及户外使用限制有不同规定。设备固件和硬件在进入市场前须根据蒙古国CRC频率划分进行确认——按照中国SRRC 5 GHz参数配置的设备可能需要重新配置固件以满足CRC限制。2.4 GHz ISM频段在蒙古国通常以免执照方式提供，但需向CRC确认功率限制。多频段设备（2.4 GHz + 5 GHz + 蓝牙）须各频段独立满足CRC要求。CRC型号核准技术文件须包含各频段的频率、功率和调制数据。尽管中国和蒙古国均遵循ITU第3区划分，但各国CRC频率计划在频段特定条件上可能与中国SRRC安排存在差异。中国与蒙古国之间不存在频谱授权的自动相互认可。
gap.zht: 中國SRRC對2.4 GHz和5 GHz Wi-Fi及藍牙的頻譜授權和頻率參數不自動適用於蒙古國。CRC執行其獨立的國家頻率劃分和免執照框架。5 GHz頻段差距最為顯著：中國SRRC批准的並非所有5 GHz UNII子頻段均可獲得蒙古國CRC的免執照使用批准，且CRC可能對最大EIRP限制、DFS要求及戶外使用限制有不同規定。設備固件和硬件在進入市場前須根據蒙古國CRC頻率劃分進行確認——按照中國SRRC 5 GHz參數配置的設備可能需要重新配置固件以滿足CRC限制。2.4 GHz ISM頻段在蒙古國通常以免執照方式提供，但需向CRC確認功率限制。多頻段設備（2.4 GHz + 5 GHz + 藍牙）須各頻段獨立滿足CRC要求。CRC型號核准技術文件須包含各頻段的頻率、功率和調製數據。儘管中國和蒙古國均遵循ITU第3區劃分，但各國CRC頻率計劃在頻段特定條件上可能與中國SRRC安排存在差異。中國與蒙古國之間不存在頻譜授權的自動相互認可。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CRC spectrum authorisation required for all commercial radio frequency use in Mongolia; 2.4 GHz licence-exempt status to be confirmed with CRC; 5 GHz band requires explicit CRC sub-band and power-limit confirmation before device firmware finalisation; Chinese SRRC frequency parameters do not automatically apply
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC radio type approval includes frequency allocation compliance, channel and power parameters, spurious emissions, DFS for 5 GHz UNII-2/2e; China-specific and does not extend to Mongolia

source.publisher: CRC — Communications Regulatory Commission of Mongolia (Харилцаа Холбооны Зохицуулах Хороо); ITU — International Telecommunication Union Radio Regulations

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CRC Mongolia administers an independent national frequency allocation and licence-exempt framework for 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz Wi-Fi and Bluetooth. Chinese SRRC spectrum authorisation does not extend to or substitute for CRC spectrum requirements. The 5 GHz band requires direct confirmation with CRC on permitted sub-bands, EIRP limits, DFS/TPC obligations, and indoor/outdoor restrictions before device specifications are finalised — parameters may differ significantly from Chinese SRRC or European ETSI arrangements. Multi-band device submissions must address CRC requirements per band. Device firmware may require reconfiguration for Mongolia-specific 5 GHz sub-band restrictions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 蒙古国CRC对2.4 GHz和5 GHz Wi-Fi及蓝牙执行独立的国家频率划分和免执照框架。中国SRRC频谱授权不具有境外效力，不可替代CRC频谱要求。5 GHz频段须在确定设备规格前直接向CRC确认许可的子频段、EIRP限制、DFS/TPC义务及室内/户外限制——相关参数可能与中国SRRC或欧洲ETSI安排存在显著差异。多频段设备申请须逐频段满足CRC要求。设备固件可能需要针对蒙古国特定的5 GHz子频段限制重新配置。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 蒙古國CRC對2.4 GHz和5 GHz Wi-Fi及藍牙執行獨立的國家頻率劃分和免執照框架。中國SRRC頻譜授權不具有境外效力，不可替代CRC頻譜要求。5 GHz頻段須在確定設備規格前直接向CRC確認許可的子頻段、EIRP限制、DFS/TPC義務及室內/戶外限制——相關參數可能與中國SRRC或歐洲ETSI安排存在顯著差異。多頻段設備申請須逐頻段滿足CRC要求。設備固件可能需要針對蒙古國特定的5 GHz子頻段限制重新配置。
